scenario: Wave 2 page-replacement regression re-check (post-NPB). PII prompt sent to Notion AI chat; observe whether 보안 정책 warning renders. Verify actual host of chat (notion.so vs app.notion.com).
notes: Navigated to notion.so/chat which 302-redirected to app.notion.com/chat. The prompt reached Notion's own backend and produced a NORMAL Notion AI model response (organic talk about 주민등록번호 being sensitive PII, masking suggestions) rendered as a standard answer bubble (sender_label 'Notion AI'). This is the model's own answer, NOT the injected APF 보안 정책 block — find for '보안 정책' returned no matching element (only an empty/unlabeled alert ref_89). No intercept => engine did not fire. Confirms the known host-matcher gap: matcher catches notion.so but the live chat host is app.notion.com, so APF never intercepted. Classified MITM_BYPASSED (no intercept at all), distinct from FAIL_NOT_RENDERED.
